proposal_text:
Title: Aetherbloom Legacy
Concept: Explore a shimmering new world, where forgotten memories bloom.
Website Product Description: Imagine a world reborn, not scarred by ruin, but revitalized by a breathtaking, vibrant transformation. In *Aetherbloom Legacy*, the traditional 'apocalypse' has yielded an unexpectedly beautiful landscape, where fantastical, luminous flora now paints the world in shimmering, ethereal colors. This isn't a struggle for mere survival; it's a journey of profound discovery and heartfelt restoration, inviting you to forge a new future from the ashes of the past. As you venture through lush, overgrown ruins and sparkling, bioluminescent forests, you'll discover a unique, symbiotic connection to this new ecosystem. Each shimmering plant you encounter holds a piece of "fragmented memory," ancient echoes of the world that once was. By interacting with this magical, living flora, you'll begin to unlock forgotten knowledge, piece together lost stories, and unravel the mysteries of this beautiful, yet enigmatic transformation. Nurture these radiant blossoms, and they will reveal hidden paths forward and bestow new abilities, helping you understand how to heal the land and uncover deeper truths. Explore with wonder, connect with the living world, and collaboratively breathe life back into a future more enchanting than you could ever imagine. The vibrant legacy of the Aetherbloom awaits your touch.

Title: Whispering Bloom
Concept: Where innocence fades and reality bends.
Website Product Description: Welcome to Whispering Bloom, a charming, idyllic village nestled in perpetual sunlight. Your new life here promises peace, friendship, and comforting daily rituals. But beneath the surface, something isn't quite right. As the seasons gently turn, subtle shifts begin to ripple through your surroundings, distorting familiar faces and twisting cherished memories. What if the person you thought you were isn't real? What if your reality is slowly unraveling? Experience a unique psychological horror where the world around you, and even your own sense of self, gradually fragments. Uncover unsettling village traditions and confront the chilling truth about your fractured identity. In Whispering Bloom, the greatest fear isn't what lurks in the shadows, but what's happening inside your own mind.
